ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the predictive model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the current version of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the model */,
  "accuracy_score" REAL /* Accuracy score of the model */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model (Active, Inactive, Depreciated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Name of the region within the country */,
  "city" TEXT /* Name of the city (if applicable) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the location data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projections" (
  "projection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each projection */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the model generating the projection */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the location associated with the projection */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the projection */,
  "cases_predicted" INTEGER /* Predicted number of cases */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the model version */,
  "confidence_interval_lower" INTEGER /* Lower bound of the confidence interval */,
  "confidence_interval_upper" INTEGER /* Upper bound of the confidence interval */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the projection was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the projection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("projection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projections_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projections_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projections_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_outputs" (
  "output_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each output */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the model that produced the output */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the location associated with the output */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the output */,
  "output_value" REAL /* Output value (could be cases, hospitalizations, etc.) */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the model version */,
  "output_type" TEXT /* Type of output (e.g., cases, hospitalizations, deaths) */,
  "confidence_interval_lower" REAL /* Lower bound of the confidence interval */,
  "confidence_interval_upper" REAL /* Upper bound of the confidence interval */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the output was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the output */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("output_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_outputs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_outputs_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES model_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_outputs_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, health official, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location associated with the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "projection_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the projection being accessed */,
  "output_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the output being accessed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access log was created */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_projection_id FOREIGN KEY ("projection_id") REFERENCES projections ("projection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_output_id FOREIGN KEY ("output_id") REFERENCES model_outputs ("output_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comparison_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "model_ids" TEXT /* Comma-separated IDs of models compared */,
  "location_ids" TEXT /* Comma-separated IDs of locations compared */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report generation */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., comparison, trend analysis) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the report */,
  "is_shared" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the report is shared with other users */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* Comma-separated user IDs of users the report is shared with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparison_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the model */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was released */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the version */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the version (e.g., changes made, bug fixes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
